# AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) Audit Report
**Site:** mezzofy.com
**Audit Date:** 2026-03-17
**Auditor:** Mezzofy Webmaster Agent
**Pages Audited:** 30
**Focus:** How AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Google AI Overview, Gemini) discover, understand, and surface Mezzofy content
**Report Version:** v2 — Post-Improvement

---

## Score Trajectory

| Date | Score | Grade | Change |
|------|:-----:|:-----:|:------:|
| 2026-03-17 (Initial Audit) | 64/100 | C+ | — |
| **2026-03-17 (Post-Improvement)** | **82/100** | **B+** | **+18** |

---

## Executive Summary

### Site-Level AEO Assessment

| Section | Before | After | Change |
|---------|:------:|:-----:|:------:|
| AI Discovery Infrastructure | 16/20 (B) | **19/20 (A)** | +3 |
| Entity Clarity & Schema Depth | 14/25 (D+) | **22/25 (B+)** | +8 |
| FAQ & Answer Engine Coverage | 17/20 (B+) | **19/20 (A)** | +2 |
| Content Structure for Passage Indexing | 11/15 (B) | **11/15 (B)** | — |
| E-E-A-T Signals | 5/10 (C) | **8/10 (B)** | +3 |
| Voice & Conversational Readiness | 4/10 (D) | **7/10 (B-)** | +3 |
| **TOTAL AEO SCORE** | **67/100 (C+)** | **86/100 (B+)** | **+19** |

**Per-Page Average:** 64 → **78** (+14)

**Summary:** Major AEO improvements delivered in this session. The critical gaps in entity schema depth, FAQ coverage, voice readiness, and E-E-A-T signals have been substantially addressed. The largest remaining gap is news article structure — all 8 articles lack H2 sub-sections, limiting AI passage-level indexing.

---

## AEO vs SEO: What This Audit Measures

| Dimension | SEO Focus | AEO Focus |
|-----------|-----------|-----------|
| Discovery | Crawlability, indexability | llms.txt, AI bot permissions, JSON-LD depth |
| Signals | Title, meta desc, canonical | Entity clarity, schema relationships, Q&A structure |
| Ranking | Keywords, backlinks, PageRank | Answer completeness, directness, entity authority |
| Result Type | Blue links | AI-generated summaries, featured snippets, voice answers |
| Audience | Google/Bing search bots | ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Google AI Overviews, Gemini |

---

## Section 1: AI Discovery Infrastructure (19/20 ↑)

### 1.1 llms.txt Assessment

| Check | Status | Notes |
|-------|:------:|-------|
| File exists at `/llms.txt` | ✅ | Accessible at `https://mezzofy.com/llms.txt` |
| Site description paragraph | ✅ | Good 2-sentence summary of platform |
| All 30 pages listed | ✅ | Core, Products, Resources, About, Blog, News sections |
| Page descriptions meaningful | ✅ | Expanded to 20-30 word summaries with specific facts |
| AI usage policy | ✅ | Present — allows content use with attribution |
| Language declaration | ✅ | EN/zh-TW/zh-CN documented |
| Contact for AI queries | ✅ | `info@mezzofy.com` added |
| Content freshness signal | ✅ | `Last Updated: 2026-03-17` added |
| Missing: preferred citation format | ❌ | No guidance on how AI should cite/quote Mezzofy |

**Score: 9/10** ↑ (was 7/10)

## Section 2: Entity Clarity & Schema Depth (22/25 ↑)

### 2.1 Organization Schema Audit ✅ RESOLVED

**Updated state** (index.html + about.html):

| Property | Before | After |
|----------|:------:|:-----:|
| name | ✅ | ✅ |
| url | ✅ | ✅ |
| logo | ✅ | ✅ |
| description | ✅ | ✅ |
| foundingDate | ✅ | ✅ |
| areaServed | ✅ | ✅ |
| sameAs (LinkedIn) | ✅ | ✅ |
| **legalName** | ❌ | ✅ Added: "Mezzofy Limited" |
| **foundingLocation (HK)** | ❌ | ✅ Added |
| **founder (Person: Dicky Yin)** | ❌ | ✅ Added with sameAs LinkedIn |
| **contactPoint** | ❌ | ✅ Added with email + languages |
| **knowsAbout (7 domains)** | ❌ | ✅ Added: Digital Coupons, NFC, CaaS, etc. |
| **award (3 awards)** | ❌ | ✅ Added: ESG, Environmental, CII |
| **hasOfferCatalog (4 products)** | ❌ | ✅ Added |
| **sameAs (Twitter)** | ❌ | ✅ Added |
| numberOfEmployees | ❌ | ❌ Optional — not added |

**Entity Score: 14/14 core properties present = STRONG** ↑ (was 5/14)

---

### 2.2 Person Schema ✅ RESOLVED

**Added to:** `about.html`, `index.html`, `news/forbes-dicky-yin.html`

```json
{
  "@type": "Person",
  "name": "Dicky Yin",
  "jobTitle": "Founder & CEO",
  "worksFor": {"@type": "Organization", "name": "Mezzofy"},
  "sameAs": "https://www.linkedin.com/in/dickyyin/"
}
```

AI engines asked "Who founded Mezzofy?" can now extract machine-readable founder identity. ✅

---

### 2.3 Product / SoftwareApplication Schema ✅ RESOLVED

**Added to:** All 7 product pages (coupon-management, coupon-marketplace, coupon-nfc, coupon-marketing, coupon-wallet, coupon-playbook, coupon-serial)

AI engines can now identify Mezzofy products as software services and match product-level queries. ✅

---

### 2.4 HowTo Schema ✅ RESOLVED

**Added to:** `nfc-user-guide.html` with 5-step process (Find tag → Enable NFC → Tap phone → Claim coupon → Redeem at checkout)

AI voice assistants can now answer "How do I use a Mezzofy NFC coupon?" with step-by-step instructions. ✅

---

### 2.5 WebSite SearchAction ✅ RESOLVED

**Added to:** `index.html` WebSite schema — `potentialAction` with SearchAction enables sitelinks search box eligibility. ✅

---

## Section 4: Content Structure for Passage Indexing (11/15 — UNCHANGED)

### 4.1 Heading Hierarchy Assessment

| Page Type | H1 | H2 | H3 | AI Indexability |
|-----------|----|----|----|:---------------:|
| Homepage | ✅ 1 | ✅ 4 | ✅ 15+ | ✅ High |
| Solution pages | ✅ 1 | ✅ 4-5 | ✅ 8-12 | ✅ High |
| Product pages | ✅ 1 | ✅ 4-6 | ✅ 8-14 | ✅ High |
| Corporate pages | ✅ 1 | ✅ 3-5 | ✅ 5-10 | ✅ High |
| Blog articles | ✅ 1 | ✅ 4-5 | ❌ 0 | ✅ High |
| **News articles** | **✅ 1** | **❌ 0** | **❌ 0** | **⚠️ Low** |

**Remaining issue: All 8 news articles lack H2 sub-sections** — single-block text after H1. This limits AI passage indexing and is the #1 remaining AEO improvement opportunity.

### 4.2 Recommended News Article H2 Structure

```
H1: [Article Title]
H2: [Coverage Context — e.g., "Forbes China Recognition" / "Award Details"]
H2: About [the Achievement/Award/Partnership]
H2: What This Means for Mezzofy
H2: About Mezzofy
```

Adding 2-3 H2 sections per news article would improve news AEO from ~52 to ~68 average.

### 5.1 E-E-A-T Scorecard (Updated)

| 3rd-party media coverage | ⚠️ Wrong publisher | ✅ Correct publisher attribution (4 fixed) |

| Social proof / LinkedIn | ✅ 1 sameAs | ✅ LinkedIn + Twitter |
| Contact information | HTML only ❌ | ✅ `contactPoint` in Organization |
| Location/headquarters (HK) | ❌ | ✅ `foundingLocation` in Organization |
| Specific case study (PARKnSHOP) | HTML only | ✅ Now in FAQ text |
| Funding evidence (USD 2M) | ⚠️ NewsArticle | ✅ NewsArticle + investors FAQ |
| Security claims (HMAC, tokenized) | ✅ FAQ text | ✅ FAQ text |

**Score: 8/10** ↑ (was 5/10)

## Section 6: Voice & Conversational Readiness (7/10 ↑)

### 6.1 Speakable Schema ✅ RESOLVED (Partial)

**Added to 3 key pages:**
- `index.html` — hero-section, H1, hero description
- `for-merchants.html` — hero section, product summary
- `coupon-nfc.html` — product description, key features

AI voice assistants (Google Assistant, Siri, Alexa) can now identify the most voice-readable content on these pages.

**Remaining:** speakable not added to all 30 pages — recommend adding to top 10 traffic pages.

### 6.2 HowTo Schema ✅ RESOLVED

`nfc-user-guide.html` now has `HowTo` schema with 5 steps:
1. Find NFC tag at participating retail location
2. Enable NFC on your phone
3. Tap phone to NFC tag
4. Claim coupon to Mezzofy Wallet
5. Redeem coupon at checkout

Apple Intelligence and Google Assistant can now answer "How do I use a Mezzofy NFC coupon?" with step-by-step voice instructions.

### 6.3 Conversational Query Coverage

**Score: 7/10** ↑ (was 4/10)

#### Core Pages

| Page | Schema | FAQ | Structure | E-E-A-T | AI-Specific | **Before** | **After** | Δ |
|------|:------:|:---:|:---------:|:-------:|:-----------:|:----------:|:---------:|:-:|
| index.html | 28/30 | 24/25 | 18/20 | 14/15 | 9/10 | 52 | **93** | +41 |
| about.html | 28/30 | 0/25 | 17/20 | 14/15 | 8/10 | 57 | **67** | +10 |
| contact.html | 21/30 | 0/25 | 15/20 | 8/15 | 5/10 | 45 | **49** | +4 |

**Notes:**
- `index.html`: Transformed from 52 → 93 with enriched Organization, Person, FAQPage (5 Q&As), SearchAction, Speakable. Now the strongest AEO page on the site.
- `about.html`: Improved with AboutPage type, Person schema, enriched Organization. No FAQ — would score 87+ if FAQ added.
- `contact.html`: ContactPage type added. Still no FAQ — limited AEO improvement possible for a contact page.
